markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, NGINX workflow, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Pivot:** Shift content focus from the underperforming "Flexibility Tax" cluster (engagement down 31%) to high-growth industry verticals (e.g., Expense Management, up 45%).](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [**NGINX Workflow:** A new "Pending Approval" status will track articles awaiting legal review, preventing premature publication and ensuring compliance.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [**Content Cadence:** NGINX articles will be published gradually (\~2/week) to avoid overwhelming the content calendar and to allow for a steady feedback loop with legal.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [**Data Gap:** Conversion data is needed to connect blog traffic to user conversions, enabling a clear ROI measurement for content efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Overall Growth:** Sessions are up 45% since early December.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [**NGINX Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
      - [**Problem:** CTR is declining despite improved rankings and clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** SERP features (ads, "People Also Ask") are stealing clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [**Solution:** Double down on industry-specific content to gain more SERP real estate and authority, pushing competitors and features down.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [**Cluster Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [**"Flexibility Tax":** Engagement is down 31% since Dec 1.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [**Industry Verticals:** Show strong growth.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
          - [**Expense & Financial Management:** Up 45% in 30 days.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
          - [**Business Travel:** 49 unique users in 30 days.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [**CheckThat Data (vs. sunsetting Scrunch):**](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
      - [**Visibility:** 16.8% (up from 13% average since Dec 1).](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
      - [**Positioning:** 79% (up 3% in 2 months).](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)

### NGINX Content Workflow

  - [**Legal Feedback:** Legal requires removing "credit card" verbiage, as NGINX is a charge card. This feedback will be incorporated into future content briefs.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Status Management:**](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [**New Status:** "Pending Approval" will track articles awaiting legal sign-off.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This prevents premature publication and ensures compliance.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [**Publishing Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
      - [**Plan:** Publish NGINX articles gradually (\~2/week) alongside other content types (editorial, FAQs).](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Avoids overwhelming the content calendar and provides a steady feedback loop for legal edits.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)

### Recent Product Launches

  - [Hotel Engine launched two new products:](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [**Rewards Program:** A new loyalty program.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [**Spaces:** A new product for booking hotel meeting rooms.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Joel:**](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
      - [Get conversion data from Kyle.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Provide source material for Direct Bill, FlexPro, and Duty of Care content.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
      - [Review the 9 NGINX articles due today and submit them for legal review.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
      - [Add "Pending Approval" status to the NGINX tracker.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
      - [Send Joel the article list for next week's batch.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
      - [Complete the NGINX competitive gap analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/iXtfH8B1CWy3bX3bbEBqs1aCTjeDj4j7?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
